title: Japanese Frittata with Melted Morbier
description: A Japanese-inspired twist on the classic frittata, featuring melted morbier cheese and a spicy kick.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté diced potatoes over medium heat until tender.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, soy sauce, and a pinch of salt.
Add beaten eggs to the skillet with potatoes and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes.
Remove skillet from the oven and top with sliced morbier cheese.
Return skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, until cheese is melted.
Remove skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped green onions.
Add a drizzle of fiery sauce, if desired, for an extra kick.
Slice frittata into wedges and serve hot, with a side of soy sauce for dipping.
